App.emptyBody: Add a provider account to watch quotas, credits, and reset windows from one board.

composio.hint: Org API key · monthly tool-call quota

Tile.ariaLabel: {provider} account {name}. Activate to edit. Use the drag handle to rearrange.

Wizard.codexCreateHint: Open the authorize URL, sign in, then paste the localhost callback URL. Tokens refresh automatically.
Wizard.codexEditHint: Session expired or needs refresh — sign in again, then paste the localhost callback URL.
Wizard.antigravityCreateHint: Open the authorize URL, sign in with Google, then paste the 127.0.0.1 callback URL (the page may fail to load — copy the address bar). Tokens refresh automatically.
Wizard.antigravityEditHint: Session expired or needs refresh — sign in with Google again, then paste the 127.0.0.1 callback URL.

placeholders.exaKeyId: Search key UUID — leave blank for all keys

help.opencodeCookie: Export cookies with <ext>Get cookies.txt LOCALLY</ext> while on opencode.ai, or paste the raw token (e.g. Fe26.2**…) / full Cookie header from DevTools → Network → any opencode.ai request. OpenCode Go auth is web-based and shared across Windows and WSL terminals.
help.opencodeWorkspace: Leave blank to discover the default workspace from your session. Override only if you need a specific workspace (opencode.ai/workspace/wrk_…/go).
help.cursorCookie: Export cookies with Get cookies.txt LOCALLY while logged in at cursor.com, or copy WorkosCursorSessionToken from DevTools → Application → Cookies. Usagi polls the unofficial dashboard /api/usage-summary endpoint (plan %, Auto + Composer, API, on-demand). Sessions expire — paste a fresh cookie when auth fails.
help.tavilyKey: From app.tavily.com. Usage is polled via GET /usage (Bearer). That endpoint allows 10 requests per 10 minutes, so Usagi refreshes Tavily at most every 2 minutes (and backs off for 10 minutes if rate-limited).
help.exaKey: From dashboard.exa.ai → Team Management / service API key. Usagi polls 3d / 7d / 30d spend via admin-api.exa.ai. Set a spending budget on the search key in Exa to show a Key budget remaining bar ($Y / $Z). Team wallet balance is not exposed by the API. A regular search key only confirms auth (no spend meters).
help.exaKeyId: Scope meters to one search key. Leave blank to aggregate all keys on the team.
help.composioKey: From dashboard → Organization Settings → Organization Access Tokens (`oak_…`). Usagi polls monthly tool calls / pro tool calls via POST /api/v3.1/org/usage/summary. Consumer keys (`ck_…`) only work for Connect MCP and will not work here.
help.composioPlan: Composio's subscription API is cookie-auth only, so Usagi cannot read your plan from an org key. Pick your plan for accurate quota bars, or leave Auto (Free quotas; escalates if month-to-date usage exceeds a lower tier).

errors.exaKeyRequired: Paste your Exa Team Management service key.
errors.composioKeyRequired: Paste your Composio org API key (oak_…).
errors.oauthCallbackRequired: Paste the OAuth callback URL after signing in.
